system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user:
{"procName":"dbo.sp_tinhbuam_toanbo","body":"CREATE   PROCEDURE dbo.sp_TinhBuAm_ToanBo
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    PRINT '=== BẮT ĐẦU QUÉT & ĐIỀU CHỈNH TỒN KHO TOÀN BỘ ===';

    /* Xóa log tạm nếu có */
    IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#ChenhLech') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #ChenhLech;

    /* =========================================================
       1️⃣ LẤY TỒN KHO THỰC TẾ TỪ tr_tonkho_sum
       ========================================================= */
    SELECT 
        m.mavt,
        ISNULL(t.soluong + t.nhapton, 0) AS ton_thucte
    INTO #ChenhLech
    FROM tr_material m
    LEFT JOIN tr_tonkho_sum t ON t.mavt = m.mavt
    WHERE ISNULL(m.xoa, 'N') = 'N';

    /* =========================================================
       2️⃣ TÍNH TỒN LÝ THUYẾT = TỔNG NHẬP - TỔNG XUẤT
       ========================================================= */
    UPDATE c
    SET c.ton_thucte = ISNULL(tks.soluong + tks.nhapton, 0)
    FROM #ChenhLech c
    INNER JOIN tr_tonkho_sum tks ON tks.mavt = c.mavt;

    /* Tổng nhập */
    WITH Nhap AS (
        SELECT 
            n.mavt,
            SUM(n.slnhap) AS tongnhap
        FROM tr_ctphieunhap n
        INNER JOIN tr_phieunhap pn ON pn.sopn = n.sopn
        WHERE pn.active = 1 AND ISNULL(n.gianhap, 0) > 0
        GROUP BY n.mavt
    ),
    Xuat AS (
        SELECT 
            x.mact AS mavt,
            SUM(x.soluong) AS tongxuat
        FROM tr_ctphieuxuat x
        INNER JOIN tr_phieuxuat px ON px.sopx = x.phieuxuat
        WHERE px.active = 1 AND ISNULL(x.giaxuat, 0) > 0
        GROUP BY x.mact
    )
    SELECT 
        c.mavt,
        ISNULL(n.tongnhap, 0) AS tongnhap,
        ISNULL(x.tongxuat, 0) AS tongxuat,
        (ISNULL(n.tongnhap, 0) - ISNULL(x.tongxuat, 0)) AS ton_lythuyet,
        c.ton_thucte,
        (ISNULL(c.ton_thucte, 0) - (ISNULL(n.tongnhap, 0) - ISNULL(x.tongxuat, 0))) AS chenhlech
    INTO #ChenhLech_Final
    FROM #ChenhLech c
    LEFT JOIN Nhap n ON n.mavt = c.mavt
    LEFT JOIN Xuat x ON x.mavt = c.mavt;

    /* =========================================================
       3️⃣ GHI LOG VÀ CẬP NHẬT BẢNG TỒN
       ========================================================= */
    DECLARE @Count INT = 0;

    INSERT INTO tr_tonkho_bulog (mavt, slbu, ghichu)
    SELECT 
        mavt,
        chenhlech,
        CONCAT('Tự động điều chỉnh tồn để khớp với tồn kho thực tế (', GETDATE(), ')')
    FROM #ChenhLech_Final
    WHERE chenhlech <> 0;  -- chỉ log những dòng cần bù

    -- Cập nhật tồn trong tr_tonkho_sum
    UPDATE t
    SET t.soluong = CASE 
                        WHEN (t.soluong + t.nhapton + f.chenhlech) < 0 THEN 0
                        ELSE t.soluong + f.chenhlech
                    END
    FROM tr_tonkho_sum t
    INNER JOIN #ChenhLech_Final f ON f.mavt = t.mavt
    WHERE f.chenhlech <> 0;

    SELECT @Count = COUNT(*) FROM #ChenhLech_Final WHERE chenhlech <> 0;

    /* =========================================================
       4️⃣ THÔNG BÁO KẾT QUẢ
       ========================================================= */
    IF @Count > 0
        PRINT CONCAT('===> Đã điều chỉnh ', @Count, ' vật tư để tồn khớp với tồn kho thực tế.');
    ELSE
        PRINT '===> Tất cả vật tư đã khớp tồn kho, không cần điều chỉnh.';

    PRINT '=== HOÀN TẤT BÙ & ĐIỀU CHỈNH TỒN KHO TOÀN BỘ ===';
END;","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.nhap","dbo.tr_ctphieunhap","dbo.tr_ctphieuxuat","dbo.tr_material","dbo.tr_phieunhap","dbo.tr_phieuxuat","dbo.tr_tonkho_sum","dbo.xuat"],"writesTables":["dbo.c","dbo.t","dbo.tr_tonkho_bulog"],"flags":["has-cte","has-group-by","has-temp-table","writes-multi-table"],"suggestedTier":"D"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
